response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely aligning with the role's stack. His background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, alongside measurable impact in high-throughput environments. The breadth of his experience and leadership in open-source projects further solidifies his fit.
strengths: Direct alignment with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js)
Proven experience in scalable systems and AI-agent development
Strong leadership and open-source contributions demonstrating architectural depth
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Vitest (though testing expertise is evident)
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not directly relevant to the position
German language skills are basic, though English is fluent
